productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Olive Jackets
description: Composition Olive green jacket made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with broad elasticated cuffs, mock collar with a buttoned closure and knitted inner collar, concealed zippered front closure, two insert pockets, appliquéd branding on the left chest, branding printed on the right sleeve and a quilted look Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash cold, inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Warm steam iron; Do not iron on decorations This jacket from US Polo is inspired by classic sport style staples. The sleek finish offers style, doubled with comfort. The polyester fabric enables this jacket to be a wardrobe favourite in all seasons. Layer this over tees, denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
